examples: At this moment he saw a cab at the top of the Faubourg Poissonniere.
It was said that these munitions came from a grocer in the Faubourg Saint-Antoine named Pepin.
The Faubourg Sainte Marie became the “American section” in the early 19th century and the hub of most business activities.
The Faubourg Treme was one of the first places in the southern United States where free African Americans owned property at a time when slavery still existed.
